---
title: "ENEL602 - Electronics Project"
author: "Zach Barrett"
date: last-modified
---

---

## Pages:
- Assignments:
  - [Troubleshooting](./troubleshooting.qmd)
  - [Project One](./Project One.qmd)
  - [Project Two](./Project Two.qmd)
  - [Final Report](./Final Report.qmd)
- Misc:
  - [Routing Rules](./routing.qmd)
